name: Keyboard
summary: An interactive virtual keyboard with authentic key sounds that visualizes typing in real-time.
detailedDescription: Keyboard renders a full QWERTY keyboard layout with interactive key visualization and authentic mechanical keyboard sounds. Each key has mapped sound sprite coordinates (startMs, durationMs) from audio files for keydown and keyup events. The component uses Web Audio API for low-latency sound playback. Visual feedback highlights pressed keys with motion animations. Layout includes function row (F1-F12), number row, QWERTY rows, modifier keys (Shift, Ctrl, Alt, CapsLock), and navigation cluster. Tabler Icons represent special keys (volume, brightness, microphone, search, world, command). The keyboard responds to both physical key presses and mouse/touch interaction. Sound definitions cover full 100+ key layout with unique tones per key for realistic typing experience. This creates immersive typing visualization ideal for typing tutorials, keyboard shortcut guides, accessibility tools, or any context where showing keyboard input enhances user understanding.
purpose: Visualize keyboard input with key highlights
behavior: Maps physical keys to visual highlights
Uses Web Audio API for low latency
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
